title: Senior Doctor - Suven Pharmaceuticals - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Suven Pharmaceuticals - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Suven Pharmaceuticals in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Suven Pharmaceuticals:
Suven Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Suven Pharmaceuticals!
